summary: Neither eflornithine nor sulindac provides proven sustained efficacy for halting disease progression in familial adenomatous polyposis. Sulindac shows limited short-term benefit with recurrence post-discontinuation, while no evidence supports eflornithine’s role in this condition.

Sulindac shows limited short-term benefit with recurrence post-discontinuation, while no evidence supports eflornithine’s role in this condition.. Answer choice: B
